rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core constructs (interfirm network degree centrality and brokerage/structural holes affecting firm outcomes, with moderators) closely overlap with the cited paper’s centrality/betweenness and ego-network interaction framework for innovation outcomes. Given this strong conceptual-methodological proximity and a confirmed DOI-level match (10.1509/jmr.13.0226), this does not look like an obvious incidental mention.
